title: Trump says Vance-Rubio ticket for 2028 presidential election would be ‘unbeatable’ – US politics live
summary_full: President tells podcast that vice-president and secretary of state ‘would be very hard to beat’ if they ran together in 2028The Democrats to watch after Tuesday’s primariesSign up for the Breaking News US emailTrump also said he still felt optimistic he would have a deal “fairly quickly” and once again downplayed the impact of his war against Iran on Americans’ finances.“Everyone said it was going to be $300, $400 a barrel, it’s $98 a barrel but that’s not a big price to pay if you look at the possibility of them having a nuclear weapon,” he told the Pod Force One podcast.I don’t want to say ‘angry’. I was a little bit perturbed at his constantly fighting with Lebanon, you know, at some point I said, ‘Bibi, we gotta stop this, we gotta stop it.’ Continue reading...
